reason_for_reset: Repeated abstain results and one rejected same-surface leakage candidate. The v1 target allowed execution-tree status fields to restate the target, so the next loop must use future-realized labels and provider agreement labels instead.

regime_families_v2.description: Same-market provider majority agrees on trend expansion and future path avoids bad-loss/tail-loss through the horizon.
Provider sources disagree or transition hazard remains high. This family can explain abstention but cannot hand off a release packet.
Crypto-specific expansion/stress family evaluated on Kraken/Yahoo crypto data only, not used as a QQQ/NQ substitute.

truth_labels_v2.name: ReleaseAllowedV2
truth_labels_v2.positive_definition: Future net path over the horizon avoids configured bad-loss and tail-loss and has positive net payoff after cost.

truth_labels_v2.name: ProviderAgreementV2
truth_labels_v2.positive_definition: At least two same-market provider observations agree on the coarse regime family for the current window.
truth_labels_v2.forbidden_shortcut: Do not mix Kraken crypto reachability into QQQ/NQ provider agreement.

truth_labels_v2.name: TransitionStableV2
truth_labels_v2.positive_definition: Future realized provider/price-volatility state remains inside the same coarse regime family through the minimum holding horizon.

truth_labels_v2.name: PathSpecificEdgeV2
truth_labels_v2.positive_definition: The selected branch has positive forward payoff after cost under chronological holdout, independent of execution-tree branch labels.

next_loop.action: Generate ProviderAgreementTrendExpansion and ProviderDisagreementTransitionGuardrail labels for QQQ/NQ from the durable run folder, then rerun chronological calibration without blocked leakage fields.
next_loop.must_not_do: Do not lower Wilson, ECE, support, or coverage thresholds.
